text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 31 

MDCD_IPF_LTSS_MOS 

LABEL: Medicaid — IP Psych Facility for Individuals under age 21 — LTSS Months 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year where the beneficiary’s Medicaid level of care 
status code indicated that Inpatient psychiatric facility for individuals under age 21 care was required 
to meet a beneficiary's needs. Medicaid uses this information to determine Long-Term Services and
